Who I Am

About Me

I am Aakash Tiwari, a B.Sc. Microbiologist from Govt. Holkar Science College, Indore, currently working as a QC Microbiology Analyst at Ipca Laboratories Ltd. — a WHO-GMP, USFDA, ICH Q10 and Schedule M compliant pharmaceutical manufacturer.

My expertise spans pharmaceutical-grade cleanroom operations across Grade A to D environments, environmental monitoring, water quality testing (WFI / PW / TW), and audit-ready GMP documentation. I bring scientific precision and zero-contamination discipline to every assay and process.

From basic microbial staining on the college bench to active air sampling in aseptic zones — every step of my training has been hands-on, documented, and GLP-compliant.

Internship

Chemical Analysis & Adulterants Test
of Milk and Milk Products

90-hour internship at Acropolis Institute of Management Studies & Research, Indore — July 21 to August 1, 2025

✓ Certified

Acropolis Institute of Management Studies & Research

Dept. of Biosciences, Indore (M.P.)  ·  90 Hours

Completed a comprehensive internship on chemical quality analysis and adulteration testing of milk and milk products as part of MoU between Govt. (Auto) Holkar Science College and Acropolis Institute, Indore.

Supervised by Dr. Kirtesh Khare, Mrs. Sanika Mehta (Asst. Professors) and Prof. (Dr.) Pranoti Belapurkar, Head, Dept. of Biosciences.

Expertise

Core Skills

Trained across pharmaceutical QC, food science analysis, and research microbiology with strong GMP / cGMP foundations.

Environmental Monitoring
Grade A–D cleanroom EM — active/passive air sampling, surface monitoring, and non-viable particle counting per GMP.
Grade A–DAir SamplingSurface Mon.NVP Count
Microbiology Techniques
Microbial culturing, Gram & acid-fast staining, biochemical testing, MLT, bacterial isolation and colony morphology.
Gram StainMLTCulturingIsolation
Water Sampling & QC
WFI, Purified Water and Treatment Water sampling with microbial limit testing per GMP. Coliform count and turbidity.
WFIPW SamplingColiform
Media & Aseptic Handling
Preparation of NA, SCDA, MacConkey media. Autoclaving, filtration, LAF/BSC operation, sterilisation and disinfection.
NA / SCDAAutoclaveLAF / BSC
GMP Compliance & Docs
SOP writing, logbook maintenance, audit-ready GMP/GLP documentation. ALCOA+, GDP, OQ support and EM trend analysis.
GMP / cGMPALCOA+SOPOQ
Chemical & Food Analysis
Milk QC — fat estimation, SNF determination, adulteration & H₂O₂ screening. ZnO nanoparticle synthesis via green and sol-gel methods.
Fat EstimationSNFH₂O₂ TestNanoparticles

Education

Academic Background

Foundation in microbiology from one of Madhya Pradesh's premier science colleges.

Bachelor of Science — Microbiology
Govt. Holkar Science College, Indore (Autonomous) — Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya
July 2023 – May 2026  ·  66.0 Percentile
Core subjects: microbial genetics, food microbiology, immunology, environmental microbiology, industrial microbiology and biochemistry. Extensive practical lab sessions covering culturing, staining, biochemical testing and quantitative microbiology throughout all three years.
